title: ECHS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Nursing Assistant, Female Attendant and More Posts
shortInfo: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) has released the ECHS Recruitment 2026 notification for 9 contractual Para Medical & Non-Medical Staff posts including Officer-in-Charge (Only for ESM), Medical Officer, Dental Officer, Pharmacist, Nursing Assistant, Dental Hygienist/Assistant, Ambulance Driver and Female Attendant under the Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme.

basic_details.job_title: ECHS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Nursing Assistant, Female Attendant and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Nursing Assistant, Female Attendant and More
basic_details.short_information: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) has released the ECHS Recruitment 2026 notification for 9 contractual Para Medical & Non-Medical Staff posts including Officer-in-Charge (Only for ESM), Medical Officer, Dental Officer, Pharmacist, Nursing Assistant, Dental Hygienist/Assistant, Ambulance Driver and Female Attendant under the Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate + 05 Yrs experience, MBBS+05 Yrs Experience, BDS+03 Yrs Experience, D Pharma + Registered Pharmacist+ 03 Yrs Experience, GNM + 05 Yrs Experience, Diploma Holder in Dental + 05 Yrs Experience, 8th pass + 05 yrs experience, Literate + Minimum 5 years experience
qualification.details: Officer -in-Charge (Only for ESM): Graduate + 05 Yrs experience Medical Officer: MBBS + 05 Yrs Experience Dental Officer: BDS + 03 Yrs Experience Pharmacist: D Pharma + Registered Pharmacist + 03 Yrs Experience Nursing Assistant: GNM + 05 Yrs Experience Dental Hygienist/ Assistant: Diploma Holder in Dental + 05 Yrs Experience Ambulance Driver: 8th pass + 05 yrs experience Female Attendant: Literate + Minimum 5 years experience

salary_details.details: Officer -in-Charge (Only for ESM): 95,000/- Medical OlIcer: 95,000/- Dental Officer: 95,000/- Pharmacist: 36.500/- Nursing Assistant: 36,500/ Dental Hygienist/ Assistant: 36,500/- Ambulance Driver: 25,600/- Female Attendant: 21,800/-

selection_process: Shortlisting Interview 10 day on job training (OJT)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ECHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the ECHS Para Medical & Non-Medical Staff posts is 06-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for ECHS recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 9 vacancies for Para Medical & Non-Medical Staff posts released by the Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for ECHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the ECHS Para Medical & Non-Medical Staff recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for the ECHS posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the ECHS posts varies, with some positions offering up to 95,000/-, while others range from 36,500/- down to 21,800/- per month, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What are the eligibility criteria for the Officer-in-Charge post?
faq.answer: The eligibility criteria for the Officer-in-Charge post (only for ESM) is a Graduate degree with 05 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for ECHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for ECHS recruitment includes shortlisting of candidates, followed by an interview, and a 10-day on-the-job training (OJT).

faq.question: Q7. Where can I download the ECHS application form?
faq.answer: The application form for ECHS recruitment can be downloaded from the official website of ECHS, which is www.echs.gov.in.

faq.question: Q8. What is the minimum qualification for the Ambulance Driver post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for the Ambulance Driver post is an 8th pass with 05 years of experience.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for ECHS recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no specific application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the ECHS recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the ECHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The ECHS recruitment is for posts located in Sri Ganganagar, Rajasthan, with the pincode 335001.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the ECHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the ECHS Para Medical & Non-Medical Staff posts is 06-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.
